import hashlib


def hash_password_chunks(password_parts):
    hashes = []
    for part in password_parts:
        h = hashlib.new("sha256")
        h.update(part.encode("utf-8"))
        hashes.append(h.hexdigest())
    return hashes


def verify_checksums(file_chunks, expected_hashes):
    results = []
    for chunk, expected in zip(file_chunks, expected_hashes):
        h = hashlib.new("sha256")
        h.update(chunk)
        results.append(h.hexdigest() == expected)
    return results
